items.title: Safety pilot expansion criteria
items.name: Safety pilot expansion criteria
items.summary: Discovery work will test which municipalities, workflows, and governance conditions make the adjacent safety pilot repeatable rather than bespoke.
items.opportunity: Choose an adjacent expansion path that reuses the current platform without fragmenting product focus.

linkedInitiatives.description: Executive Proof Pack exists to standardize the municipal renewal and expansion narrative.

plannedActivities: Interview municipalities already asking about safety workflows.
Map what must be reused versus specialized from the waste-enforcement model.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether the next adjacent module should be a narrow safety pilot package or a broader public-space response bundle.
